title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mahindra & Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mahindra & Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra:
Mahindra & Mahindra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra!
